pages.text: Place $(l)any smithery part$() in an anvil with a finished tool or armor piece to emboss it: the part's material grants its *traits* to the gear without changing any stats. The part is consumed.
pages.title: Borrowed Traits

pages.text: Re-embossing with a new part $(l)replaces$() the old donor, so grafted traits grow with your progression — emboss iron today, netherite next month.$(br2)Embossed traits never override anything the gear already has; they only fill gaps.
pages.title: Endlessly Replaceable
